funFacts: The Leafy Seadragon camouflaged in Seaweed is native to the temperate waters of southern Australia, feeding on tiny shrimp using its long, straw-like snout.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing intricate color highlighting using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
